info.title: Crux API
info.description: REST API for Crux ("Strava for bouldering"). Generated from Zod schemas via @asteasolutions/zod-to-openapi. See docs/adr/ for architectural decisions.

BearerAuth.description: Supabase Auth ES256 JWT. Verified via JWKS fetched from {SUPABASE_URL}/auth/v1/.well-known/jwks.json.

InternalSecret.name: X-Internal-Secret
InternalSecret.description: Shared secret for the /internal routes. Used by external cron triggers.

get.summary: Liveness probe (also checks Postgres reachability)

post.summary: Permanently delete the authenticated user (Supabase + public.users)

get.summary: Fetch the authenticated user profile (includes phone)
Public profile lookup by username
Paginated ascents (visibility depends on viewer)

schema.description: Opaque base64url cursor from a prior response

get.summary: Users the authenticated user follows, ordered by recent activity
Paginated followers list (keyset)

schema.description: Opaque base64url cursor from a prior response

get.summary: Paginated following list (keyset)

schema.description: Opaque base64url cursor from a prior response

get.summary: List all gyms
Geocode a free-text address to lat/lng
Gyms within `radius` km of a point
Gym detail + aggregate stats
Gym problems (active/retired/all), keyset paginated
Retired problems grouped by retirement month
Personal feed — ascents from users you follow
get.description: Uses keyset pagination on (logged_at DESC, id DESC). See ADR 0004.

schema.description: Opaque base64url cursor from a prior response

get.summary: Discovery feed — recent public ascents

schema.description: Opaque base64url cursor from a prior response

get.summary: Recent public ascents at a specific gym

schema.description: Opaque base64url cursor from a prior response

post.description: Multipart body with one or more photo files. Enqueues a BullMQ vision job; see ADR 0005 for the async contract. Rate limited by uploadLimiter (20/min).

get.summary: Poll vision pipeline state for an upload

post.summary: Confirm the match (or create a new problem) and log an ascent

409.description: Upload not in a confirmable state

post.summary: Open a match dispute on a matched upload

409.description: No matched problem, or open dispute already exists

get.summary: Ascent detail with joined problem and gym

post.summary: Log an ascent directly on a known problem (skips the upload flow)

get.summary: Problem detail + ascent summary + grade distribution
Paginated ascents on a problem (visibility-filtered)

schema.description: Opaque base64url cursor from a prior response

post.summary: Vote on an open match dispute (requires ascent on disputed problem)

403.description: Voter has no ascent on the disputed problem

get.summary: Search users and/or gyms by substring (min 2 chars)

post.summary: Register an Expo push token for the authenticated user
Trigger the nightly retirement sweep (cron entry point)
